risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Escalation
risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rating has increased from Moderate at approval to Substantial at the last review, indicating worsening governance fragility or political instability affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Moderate [at Approval Package - 26 May 2022] ... Substantial [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 06 - 19 Apr 2025] ... Substantial [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Coordination and Planning Difficulties Affecting Service Delivery
risk_summary: Continued difficulties with coordination, planning and outreach are impacting immunization service delivery and data quality, suggesting governance or institutional coordination challenges affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Poor quality of immunization registered filling. Continued difficulties with coordination, planning and outreach.

risk_title: Refugee Data Collection and Service Delivery Gaps
risk_summary: Disaggregated data for refugee populations is not available or incomplete across multiple health indicators, indicating potential access barriers or governance challenges in serving refugee populations as a priority project target group.
evidence_quote: Disaggregated data is still not available and will be provided in the next ISR [for refugees receiving immunization services]

risk_title: Delayed adoption of Digital Code hampering project implementation
risk_summary: The non-adoption of the Digital Code (Code du Numérique), particularly Book Two covering telecommunications regulation, is causing delays in multiple project activities across both DFN and EARDIP. This legislative gap is blocking the operationalization of key regulatory frameworks needed for project success.
evidence_quote: Le Code du Numérique n'est toujours pas adopté. Cette situation entraîne le retard de plusieurs activités qui en dépendent... La mission réitère sa recommandation au Gouvernement de prendre les mesures nécessaires afin d'adopter rapidement le Code du Numérique ou le cas échéant, son livre deuxième portant le cadre légal et règlementaire du secteur des télécommunications

risk_title: Governance fragility affecting regulatory capacity
risk_summary: The ARMD (regulatory authority) lacks its primary operational tool—the Digital Code Book Two—which is essential for regulating the telecommunications sector. This creates a governance gap that undermines the authority's ability to function effectively and implement project activities.
evidence_quote: le livre deuxième du code du numérique portant le secteur des télécommunications, qui constitue son principal outil de travail pour réguler le secteur, n'a pas encore été adopté

risk_title: Institutional capacity constraints in project management units
risk_summary: Both projects face implementation delays linked to weak institutional capacity. The DFN Component 2 is rated Modérément Insatisfaisante (Moderately Unsatisfactory) due to activity implementation delays, and EARDIP procurement execution remains slow despite project effectiveness.
evidence_quote: La performance de la composante 2 est maintenue à Modérément Insatisfaisante (MU) en raison des retards dans la mise en œuvre des activités... pour le projet d'Intégration Numérique Régionale en Afrique de l'Est, il est toujours noté que le démarrage de la passation des marchés reste lent

risk_title: Delays in environmental and social safeguards implementation for EARDIP
risk_summary: EARDIP faces significant delays in environmental and social (E&S) reporting and grievance mechanisms. Required quarterly E&S reports for Q1 and Q2 2024 were not submitted by their deadlines (October 2024 and January 2025), and the Grievance Redress Mechanism (GRM) has not been operationalized, creating governance and accountability gaps.
evidence_quote: Le premier rapport de suivi E&S (et la manière de traiter les incidents EAS/HS), conformément à l'EARDIP, n'a pas été soumis. Il devait être présenté en octobre 2024... Le deuxième rapport devait être présenté en janvier 2025... la Banque exige les deux rapports pour la fin du mois de mars au plus tard

risk_title: Weak grievance mechanisms and stakeholder engagement in both projects
risk_summary: Both DFN and EARDIP have inadequate grievance redress mechanisms (GRM). For EARDIP, it is unclear how EARDIP-specific grievances will be identified and addressed. For DFN, the GRM is not operationalized, with complaint channels not displayed on websites, work sites, or communicated to stakeholders during public consultations.
evidence_quote: Bien que l'équipe déclare disposer d'un MGP pour le projet national, il convient de clarifier la manière dont les griefs liés à l'EARDIP seront abordés et identifiés... La mission recommande aussi de rendre le MGP plus opérationnelles en affichant les canaux de réceptions des plaintes dans le site web du Ministère, les locaux de l'UGP, les sites de travaux

risk_title: Refugee enrollment and completion tracking gaps
risk_summary: The project targets refugees as a key vulnerable group but has zero reported enrollment and completion data for refugees across multiple indicators, with comments indicating data is 'currently not available.' This represents a significant implementation gap for a core FCV-vulnerable population.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Refugees (Number) 220.00 0 0 800.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Refugees (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Persons with disabilities exclusion from training programs
risk_summary: Despite targeting persons with disabilities as a vulnerable group, zero individuals with disabilities have been enrolled or completed training programs across multiple indicators, suggesting systemic barriers to inclusion of this FCV-vulnerable population.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Persons with disabilities (Number) 47.00 0 0 160.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Persons with disabilities (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Refugee participation in work-based learning and apprenticeships stalled
risk_summary: Zero refugees have been engaged in apprenticeships, internships, OJT and work-based learning despite a target of 180, indicating potential displacement or refugee population access barriers to employment integration activities.
evidence_quote: Number and share of students engaged in Apprenticeships, Internships, OJT and WBL - Refugees (Number) 0.00 0.00 0.00 180.00

risk_title: Labor mobility agreements not advancing amid regional tensions
risk_summary: Zero bilateral labor agreements have been signed despite a target of 6, and zero short-term migrant workers have been deployed despite a target of 250. This suggests potential governance or regional political barriers to labor mobility initiatives.
evidence_quote: IRI # 4: Number of Bilateral Labor Agreements signed (Number)... 0.00 Sep/2021 0 09-Jan-2025 0 12-Aug-2025 6.00 Sep/2027... IRI # 5: Annual number of short-term migrant workers from Djibouti... 0.00 Sep/2021 0 09-Jan-2025 0 12-Aug-2025 250.00 Sep/2026

risk_title: Online gig work initiative abandoned due to coordination constraints
risk_summary: The online gig work indicator targeting 500 individuals is being deleted during restructuring due to 'significant delays' and 'technical constraints and coordination with implementing partners,' suggesting governance or institutional coordination failures affecting vulnerable populations.
evidence_quote: IRI # 3: Number of individuals engaged in Online Gig Work... During the upcoming restructuring, this indicator will be deleted due to significant delays in the implementation of the corresponding activity. As of the mid-term review, no concrete action had yet been taken, partly due to technical constraints and coordination with implementing partners.

risk_title: Refugee and Asylum Seeker Data Collection Challenges
risk_summary: The project is collecting data on refugees and asylum seekers through the Population and Housing Census (RGPH-3) and the fifth household budget survey (EDAM5-IS), which included a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households. This suggests underlying displacement pressures and refugee populations that may create implementation complexities and data collection risks in a fragile context.
evidence_quote: Provisional results of thematic analyses including...Refugees and asylum seekers (Volume 14)...were released between April and July 2025. Between January and February 2025, INSTAD conducted the fifth household budget survey (Enquete Djiboutienne Aupres des Menages pour les Indicateurs Sociaux, EDAM5-IS), which included a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households.

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Persistence
risk_summary: The Political and Governance risk rating has remained at 'Substantial' across all review periods (Approval, Last Approved, and Current), indicating persistent governance fragility that could affect project implementation, particularly for institutional capacity building and coordination with government entities.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: Substantial (Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 09 - 04 Feb 2025: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial)

risk_title: Institutional Capacity and Staffing Constraints Affecting Macroeconomic Planning
risk_summary: Progress on macroeconomic modeling and debt strategy development has been slowed by staffing constraints, limiting the government's ability to implement key fiscal planning tools. This institutional weakness affects coordination between development actors and government capacity to absorb technical assistance.
evidence_quote: However, progress has been slowed by staffing constraints. To sustain momentum, a follow-up World Bank mission is planned before December 2025 to support the formulation of a Medium-Term Debt Strategy, key to embedding fiscal planning within a more structured macroeconomic framework.

risk_title: Refugee and Asylum Seeker Data Collection Challenges
risk_summary: The project is collecting data on refugees and asylum seekers through the Population and Housing Census (RGPH-3) and the fifth household budget survey (EDAM5-IS) with a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households. This suggests underlying displacement pressures and refugee populations that may create implementation complexities and data access challenges in a fragile context.
evidence_quote: Provisional results of thematic analyses including...Refugees and asylum seekers (Volume 14)...were released between April and July 2025. Between January and February 2025, INSTAD conducted the fifth household budget survey (Enquete Djiboutienne Aupres des Menages pour les Indicateurs Sociaux, EDAM5-IS), which included a boosted sample of migrant and refugee households.

risk_title: Staffing Constraints Affecting Macroeconomic Planning Capacity
risk_summary: Progress on developing the Medium-Term Debt Strategy (MTDS) has been slowed by staffing constraints, limiting the government's capacity to embed fiscal planning within macroeconomic frameworks. This institutional capacity gap may reflect broader governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: However, progress has been slowed by staffing constraints. To sustain momentum, a follow-up World Bank mission is planned before December 2025 to support the formulation of a Medium-Term Debt Strategy, key to embedding fiscal planning within a more structured macroeconomic framework.

risk_title: Fragmentation in Aid Coordination Mechanisms
risk_summary: Longstanding fragmentation in aid coordination has necessitated a consultant review to redesign Djibouti's development cooperation framework. This fragmentation suggests tensions or coordination failures between government and development actors that may affect project implementation.
evidence_quote: To address longstanding fragmentation in aid coordination, a consultant was hired in February 2025 to review and redesign Djibouti's framework for development cooperation.

risk_title: Drought Declaration Triggering Project Suspension and Restructuring
risk_summary: Government declared a drought situation in June 2025 that prompted suspension of the project's main activities and an official restructuring request to the World Bank, disrupting implementation timelines and requiring reallocation of resources.
evidence_quote: the government declared, in June 2025, a drought situation that prompted an official request to the Bank for project restructuring and also resulted in the suspension of the project's main activities

risk_title: Incomplete Water Infrastructure Rehabilitation Pending Handover
risk_summary: Rehabilitation work on 11 of 25 targeted water infrastructure facilities is complete but pending official handover, with the restructuring proposal discontinuing rehabilitation of the remaining 26 water infrastructures, creating implementation gaps in drought response capacity.
evidence_quote: completing rehabilitation work on 11 of the 25 targeted water infrastructure facilities, now pending official handover; and...it recommends discontinuing certain activities—such as rehabilitation of the remaining 26 water infrastructures

risk_title: Reallocation of Food Security Resources Due to Drought Emergency
risk_summary: The restructuring proposal reallocates SDR 3,925,000 from the Food Shortage Preparedness Fund to the Emergency Food Stock component to address the declared drought, reducing preparedness capacity for food supply shocks.
evidence_quote: The restructuring request proposes, under Component 1, doubling the strategic food reserve by reallocating SDR 3,925,000 from the Food Shortage Preparedness Fund sub-component to the Emergency Food Stock one

risk_title: Governance and Institutional Coordination Gaps Affecting Project Safety Implementation
risk_summary: Delays and lack of cooperation from ONEAD (public utility company) in coordinating service adjustments are hindering project progress and creating safety risks. Open trenches remain unresolved due to institutional coordination failures, exposing workers and road users to serious accident risks.
evidence_quote: L'entrepreneur a exprimé ses préoccupations concernant le manque de coopération de l'ONEAD et a demandé le soutien de l'ADR pour accélérer le processus. Ces tranchées ouvertes représentent un risque pour la sécurité.

risk_title: Weak Government Oversight and Non-Compliance with Environmental and Social Standards
risk_summary: Government quarterly reports lack detail on non-conformities observed in the field, indicating weak monitoring capacity or willingness to report implementation failures. Critical safety and labor violations were not documented in official reports despite being evident during field visits.
evidence_quote: Le gouvernement a partagé avec la mission le rapport trimestriel dans les délais, cependant celui-ci manquait de détails concernant les non-conformités observées sur le terrain, lesquelles n'ont pas été signalées dans le document.

risk_title: Systemic Labor Rights and Social Protection Violations on Project Sites
risk_summary: 150 daily laborers lack proper employment contracts, social security registration, and face deplorable working conditions including excessive heat exposure without adequate shelter. Accident records show significant inconsistencies, indicating weak labor governance and worker protection mechanisms.
evidence_quote: les contrats des 150 journaliers ne sont pas conformes (absence de cachets officiels, copies non remises aux employés), plusieurs travailleurs ne possèdent pas de carte de la Caisse Nationale de Sécurité Sociale (CNSS), et des incohérences significatives apparaissent dans les registres d'accidents. Les conditions des travailleurs sont également déplorables, étant exposés à la chaleur excessive sans abris adéquats

risk_title: Critical Safety and Security Failures in Project Implementation
risk_summary: Multiple critical safety violations identified during April 2025 site visit: absence of dedicated HSE agents, unsecured trenches, inadequate separation between machinery and vulnerable road users, and inadequate nighttime signaling. These failures expose workers, road users, and surrounding communities to serious accident risks.
evidence_quote: la mission a constaté l'absence d'agents Hygiène Sécurité Environnement (HSE) dédiés, de nombreuses tranchées non sécurisées, une séparation insuffisante entre les engins et personnes vulnérables utilisant la route dont les piétons, et une signalisation nocturne inadéquate dans les zones de rétrécissement. Ces manquements exposent les travailleurs, les usagers et les communautés riveraines à des risques graves d'accidents.

risk_title: High Road Safety Risks on Project Corridor
risk_summary: The corridor experiences a high number of road accidents. Thirteen traffic incidents unrelated to work zones have been reported since project start. The mission emphasized the importance of respecting road safety standards and strengthening signaling on the corridor to reduce accident risks.
evidence_quote: Prenant en compte le nombre élevé d'accidents de routes sur le corridor, ainsi que les recommandations suite à la visite de terrain, la mission a souligné l'importance du respect des normes de sécurité routière sur les tronçons inclus dans le cadre du projet.

risk_title: Inadequate Data Accuracy and Monitoring of Safety Incidents
risk_summary: Road accident data reported for the corridor (PK 13 to Arta) are inaccurate, including incorrect geographic positioning. This undermines the project's ability to track and respond to safety risks effectively, indicating weak monitoring and data management systems.
evidence_quote: les rapports des données sur les accidents du corridor sud (de PK 13 à Arta) ne sont pas exacts. Une visite de terrain a été effectuée avec l'équipe de suivi des incidents et l'entreprise pour utiliser Kobo Toolbox, renseigner les informations reportées et corriger les données sur la sécurité routière, notamment en ce qui concerne la position géographique.

risk_title: Persistent Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain at Substantial level across all rating periods, indicating ongoing fragility that could impede project implementation, particularly for cross-border coordination and institutional capacity building required for the corridor project.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Substantial Substantial Substantial [Risk Category Rating at Approval, Last Approved Rating, Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Stakeholder Engagement Challenges at Substantial Risk Level
risk_summary: Stakeholder risks remain rated as Substantial across all assessment periods, suggesting ongoing tensions or coordination challenges with government, development actors, or communities that could affect project delivery along the Djibouti-Addis corridor.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders Substantial Substantial Substantial [Risk Category Rating at Approval, Last Approved Rating, Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Refugee Student Integration and Retention Challenges
risk_summary: Refugee enrollment in primary education shows declining trend and low absolute numbers, with only 2,403 cumulative refugee enrollments against a target of 37,000 out-of-school children. School year 2024-2025 saw only 384 refugee enrollments (pending verification), representing a significant drop from previous years, suggesting potential barriers to refugee access and retention in the education system.
evidence_quote: *Refugees: 2,403 (pending verification)- cummulative 2020-2021 =496 2021-2022=596 2022-2023=425 2023-2024=502 2024-2025= 384 (pending verification)

risk_title: Limited Adoption of EMIS by Private Arabic Schools
risk_summary: Private Arabic schools have not yet adopted the government's Education Management Information System (GOSE), creating a parallel system and potential governance fragmentation. This exclusion may reflect tensions between government education priorities and private/religious education providers, limiting government visibility and management capacity over a segment of the education system.
evidence_quote: All public schools and French private schools are now using GOSE, while private Arabic schools have not yet adopted the system.

risk_title: Incomplete School Management Committee Functionality
risk_summary: Only 62% of School Management Committees are currently functional, indicating weak local governance structures and limited community participation in school oversight. This governance gap may undermine project sustainability and create space for informal power dynamics or exclusion of vulnerable populations from school decision-making.
evidence_quote: According to the recent DGS report, 62% of primary and middle schools currently have functional management committees.

risk_title: Difficult road accessibility in rural regions impacting project implementation
risk_summary: Poor road infrastructure and seasonal conditions in remote rural areas are causing logistical delays in the distribution of in-kind transfers and limiting access for implementation teams, particularly during rainy seasons.
evidence_quote: les conditions routières difficiles, particulièrement pendant la saison des pluies, rend certaines localités difficiles d'accès pour les équipes de distribution et les transporteurs, ce qui a occasionné des retards logistiques dans la livraison des vivres

risk_title: Limited economic viability and market access in remote localities
risk_summary: Rural communities face constraints in identifying viable income-generating activities due to weak market access and limited economic diversification, affecting the sustainability of productive inclusion activities (CREC and AGR).
evidence_quote: Dans certaines localités reculées, il est également difficile d'identifier des activités génératrices de revenus viables, en raison du faible accès aux marchés et du manque de diversification économique

risk_title: Weak community grievance mechanism affecting beneficiary concerns
risk_summary: The current complaint management mechanism has weaknesses that limit effective and timely response to beneficiary concerns, potentially affecting project credibility and community trust.
evidence_quote: La mission estime que le fonctionnement du mécanisme de gestion des plaintes actuel présente des faiblesses et recommande de l'améliorer pour garantir une réponse efficace et rapide aux préoccupations des bénéficiaires

risk_title: Inadequate stakeholder mobilization and beneficiary participation
risk_summary: Weak documentation of stakeholder mobilization and limited beneficiary participation are affecting project implementation and community engagement.
evidence_quote: la faible documentation des mobilisations de parties prenantes et le faible fonctionnement de MGP

risk_title: Risk of unequal access and unfair treatment in youth training programs
risk_summary: Youth training programs targeting 400 beneficiaries in interior regions carry risks of unequal opportunity and inequitable treatment, particularly for vulnerable populations, requiring proactive risk management.
evidence_quote: La mission recommande vivement que les risques associés à ces formations soient traités de manière proactive pour garantir l'égalité de chances et le traitement équitable, tout en tenant compte du public vulnérable

risk_title: Sustainability challenges for community infrastructure maintenance
risk_summary: Community-managed water and hydraulic infrastructure requires ongoing maintenance funding and management capacity, with communities facing challenges in securing resources for long-term upkeep.
evidence_quote: quelques défis subsistent, notamment la gestion des fonds nécessaires pour l'entretien et la maintenance de ces ouvrages

risk_title: Capacity constraints in financial management and governance of rural savings groups
risk_summary: Rural savings and credit groups (CREC) face challenges in governance, regular savings mobilization, and financial management capacity, requiring sustained support adapted to local realities.
evidence_quote: des capacités limitées en gestion financière et en suivi

risk_title: Difficult road accessibility in rural regions impacting project implementation
risk_summary: Poor road infrastructure and seasonal conditions in remote rural areas are causing logistical delays in the distribution of in-kind transfers and limiting access for implementation teams, particularly during rainy seasons.
evidence_quote: les conditions routières difficiles, particulièrement pendant la saison des pluies, rend certaines localités difficiles d'accès pour les équipes de distribution et les transporteurs, ce qui a occasionné des retards logistiques dans la livraison des vivres

risk_title: Limited economic viability and market access in remote localities
risk_summary: Remote rural areas face constraints in identifying viable income-generating activities due to weak market access and lack of economic diversification, limiting the effectiveness of livelihood support activities (AGR and CREC).
evidence_quote: Dans certaines localités reculées, il est également difficile d'identifier des activités génératrices de revenus viables, en raison du faible accès aux marchés et du manque de diversification économique

risk_title: Weak community grievance mechanism affecting beneficiary concerns
risk_summary: The current complaint management mechanism has structural weaknesses that limit effective and timely response to beneficiary concerns, potentially affecting project credibility and community trust.
evidence_quote: La mission estime que le fonctionnement du mécanisme de gestion des plaintes actuel présente des faiblesses et recommande de l'améliorer pour garantir une réponse efficace et rapide aux préoccupations des bénéficiaires

risk_title: Inadequate stakeholder mobilization and beneficiary participation
risk_summary: Weak documentation of stakeholder mobilization and limited beneficiary participation in project activities may undermine community ownership and project sustainability.
evidence_quote: La mission recommande de renforcer la mobilisation des parties prenantes pour assurer une meilleure participation des bénéficiaires et soutien au projet

risk_title: Risks associated with youth training program implementation
risk_summary: Youth training activities targeting 400 beneficiaries in interior regions require proactive risk management to ensure equal opportunity and fair treatment, particularly for vulnerable populations, with concerns about eligibility criteria transparency and information accessibility.
evidence_quote: La mission recommande vivement que les risques associés à ces formations soient traités de manière proactive pour garantir l'égalité de chances et le traitement équitable, tout en tenant compte du public vulnérable. A cet effet, il est important de définir préalablement les critères d'éligibilités, accessibilité de l'information et la mise en place d'une procédure de sélection transparente et juste

risk_title: Sustainability challenges for community infrastructure maintenance
risk_summary: Community-managed infrastructure (water systems, boreholes) faces sustainability risks due to limited community capacity and insufficient funding mechanisms for long-term maintenance and operations.
evidence_quote: Cependant, quelques défis subsistent, notamment la gestion des fonds nécessaires pour l'entretien et la maintenance de ces ouvrages

risk_title: Governance and financial management capacity constraints in rural savings groups
risk_summary: Rural savings and credit groups (CREC) face challenges in governance, regular savings mobilization, and financial management capacity, requiring sustained support adapted to local realities.
evidence_quote: Cependant, des défis subsistent, ce qui nécessite un accompagnement constant pour assurer une gestion optimale. En effet, parmi les défis figurent la pérennisation des structures, la mobilisation régulière de l'épargne, la sensibilisation à la bonne gouvernance, ainsi que des capacités limitées en gestion financière et en suivi

risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain at Substantial level, indicating fragility in the operating environment that could affect project implementation in Djibouti.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Substantial Substantial

risk_title: Institutional coordination delays affecting project execution
risk_summary: Delays in identifying beneficiary sites for the operational phase of internet capacity pre-purchase and slow progress in inter-agency coordination (ANSIE, MCPT, Technical Committee) are impacting project implementation timelines and connectivity rollout.
evidence_quote: Le Comité Technique (CT) poursuit ses travaux pour identifier les structures qui bénéficieront de la phase opérationnelle du préachat de capacité. Cependant la mission a noté que ce processus a accusé du retard.

risk_title: Government Administrative Delays Affecting Project Effectiveness
risk_summary: The project cannot become effective because the Government has not signed and published required governance decrees and orders in the Official Gazette, despite Council of Ministers confirmation on February 25, 2025. This administrative delay is blocking project start and affecting coordination across all donor-funded PFM projects in Djibouti.
evidence_quote: The Council of Ministers confirmed the adoption of the decree and order on February 25, 2025. However, the decree and order have not been signed and published in the Official Gazette 'Journal Officiel', delaying the project's start.

risk_title: Weak Government Institutional Capacity for Project Governance Implementation
risk_summary: Delays in operationalizing the PFM Reform Strategy governance structures are systemic across the sector, affecting all related donor projects. This indicates broader governance fragility and institutional capacity constraints within government structures responsible for coordinating economic and financial governance reforms.
evidence_quote: delays in operationalizing the PFM Reform Strategy governance structures are affecting all related projects funded by donors in Djibouti.

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Elevation
risk_summary: The SORT tool maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance risk category across all assessment periods (Approval, April 2025, and current), indicating persistent and significant governance fragility that could undermine project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 01: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - Substantial Rating Maintained
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'Substantial' across all project phases (approval, last approved rating, and proposed rating), indicating persistent governance fragility or political instability affecting project implementation in Djibouti.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: Substantial, Last Approved Rating AF Seq. 01 Approval: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial

risk_title: Macroeconomic Risk - Elevated to Substantial
risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk has been elevated from 'Moderate' at project approval to 'Substantial' in the most recent rating, suggesting worsening economic conditions or fiscal pressures that may affect project implementation capacity and sustainability in Djibouti.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Macroeconomic - Rating at Approval: Moderate, Last Approved Rating AF Seq. 01 Approval: Substantial, Proposed Rating: Substantial

risk_title: Refugee Student Integration Challenges
risk_summary: Project implementation faces ongoing challenges integrating refugee students into the education system, with refugees identified as a priority vulnerable population requiring continued enrollment efforts but facing implementation barriers.
evidence_quote: continuing the push to enroll more students, especially girls, refugees and children with special needs in school

risk_title: Refugee and Private School Data System Integration Gaps
risk_summary: The Education Management Information System (EMIS) lacks integration of refugee schools and students in irregular situations, creating data gaps that may hinder targeted support and monitoring of vulnerable populations.
evidence_quote: MENFOP is currently considering how to integrate students from the Accelerated Learning Program (ALP/PEA) who are in an irregular situation, and schools with no internet connection

risk_title: Refugee School Coverage in EMIS Expansion
risk_summary: Project priorities explicitly identify adding refugee schools to the EMIS as a remaining task, indicating current gaps in monitoring and data collection for refugee education provision.

risk_title: Refugee Integration and Social Cohesion Assessment Delays

This delays understanding of potential tensions or integration challenges.

risk_title: Refugee Property Rights Documentation Stalled
risk_summary: Property access certificates for refugees remain at zero as of May 2025, pending approval of village restructuring plans for Ali Addeh and Holl Holl refugee villages. This creates tenure insecurity and potential grievances among refugee populations.

risk_title: Refugee-Led CSO Participation Stalled
risk_summary: No refugee-led CSO sub-projects have been implemented as of May 2025, despite a target of 60 by December 2026. This indicates limited refugee community agency and participation in project activities.
evidence_quote: SEDF-funded sub-projects implemented by refugee-led CSO (Number)... 0.00 31-Oct-2023... 0.00 31-Oct-2023

risk_title: Refugee Law Implementation Recommendations Not Executed
risk_summary: Zero recommendations from sectoral action plans for operationalizing the 2017 National Refugee Law have been implemented as of May 2025, despite five action plans being prepared. This indicates governance gaps in refugee policy implementation.
evidence_quote: Recommendations resulting from the sectoral action plans that have been implemented (Number)... 0.00 15-May-2024... 0.00 30-May-2025

risk_title: Host-Refugee Social Cohesion Perception Data Missing
risk_summary: Beneficiary perception surveys on whether project investments reflected refugee and host community needs have not been conducted as of May 2025. This creates a gap in understanding potential social tensions or grievances.
evidence_quote: Beneficiaries that feel project investments reflected their needs (Percentage)... 0.00 31-Oct-2022... Not yet conducted

risk_title: Refugee Enrollment and Completion Gaps
risk_summary: The project targets refugee beneficiaries but is experiencing zero actual enrollment and completion among refugees across multiple indicators, despite baseline targets. This suggests barriers to refugee access or participation in TVET programs that may be FCV-related (displacement, documentation, security concerns, or integration tensions).
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Refugees (Number): Baseline 220.00, Actual (Current) 0, Closing Period 800.00

risk_title: Refugee Training Completion Failure
risk_summary: Zero refugees have completed TVET programs to date despite project targets of 40% completion rate for refugees. This indicates systematic barriers preventing refugee participation in or completion of training activities.
evidence_quote: Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Refugees (Percentage): Baseline 0.00, Actual (Current) 0, Closing Period 40.00

risk_title: Refugee Employment Outcomes Stalled
risk_summary: No refugees have achieved employment 6 or 9 months after program completion, with actual results at 5% (baseline) remaining unchanged. This suggests either zero program completions among refugees or employment barriers specific to refugee populations.
evidence_quote: Share of trainees employed 6 months after completion of their programs in similar sectors - Refugees (Percentage): Baseline 5.00, Actual (Current) 5, Closing Period 50.00

risk_title: Refugee Participation in Short-term Training Minimal
risk_summary: Only 195 refugees have completed short-term training programs against a target of 1,040 by project closing. This indicates significant underperformance in reaching refugee beneficiaries in training activities.
evidence_quote: Number of short-term training programs completed - Refugees (Number): Baseline 0.00, Actual (Current) 195, Closing Period 1,040.00

risk_title: Resettlement delays affecting project implementation in slum areas
risk_summary: Project investments in four slums are pending due to remaining resettlements that have not been completed, causing delays in construction and upgrading activities.
evidence_quote: Two other investments (CDC and sports field) have started, while others are pending due to a few remaining resettlements.

risk_title: Institutional capacity constraints at Land Directorate blocking land regularization
risk_summary: Land regularization files have been blocked since October 2023 due to the Land Directorate's prioritization of data migration, directly impacting the project's land certificate delivery targets and affecting host communities and refugees seeking property access.
evidence_quote: Progress has been slow and the files have been blocked by the Land Directorat since October, 2023 due to the priority it has given to the migration of INFOCAD data to the ArcGIS software.

risk_title: Refugee village restructuring plans pending approval, delaying refugee-focused investments
risk_summary: Construction in refugee villages (Ali Addeh and Holl Holl) is delayed as restructuring plans are under validation and awaiting approval, affecting property access certificates and socioeconomic integration activities for refugees.
evidence_quote: Meanwhile, the program for investments in refugee villages is under validation, with construction expected to start in the spring.

risk_title: Zero implementation of refugee-led CSO sub-projects despite targets
risk_summary: No refugee-led CSO sub-projects have been implemented (0 out of 60 target), indicating potential governance or institutional barriers to refugee economic integration and participation in project activities.
evidence_quote: SEDF-funded sub-projects implemented by refugee-led CSO (Number) 0.00 Oct/2019 0.00 31-Oct-2023 0.00 31-Oct-2023 60.00 Dec/2026

risk_title: No progress on training civil servants to implement National Refugee Law
risk_summary: Zero civil servants and civil society members have been trained on the 2017 National Refugee Law implementation despite a target of 100, indicating governance capacity gaps in refugee policy operationalization.
evidence_quote: National and local civil servants, and civil society members that were trained to foster the implementation of the 2017 Refugee Law (Number) 0.00 Sep/2020 0.00 15-May-2024 0.00 15-May-2024 100.00 Dec/2025

risk_title: No implementation of sectoral action plan recommendations for refugee law operationalization
risk_summary: Despite five sectoral action plans being prepared for the National Refugee Law, zero recommendations have been implemented as of May 2024, indicating governance and institutional implementation gaps.
evidence_quote: Recommendations resulting from the sectoral action plans that have been implemented (Number) 0.00 Sep/2020 0.00 15-May-2024 0.00 15-May-2024 6.00 Dec/2025

risk_title: Coordination and Planning Difficulties Affecting Immunization Service Delivery
risk_summary: Continued difficulties with coordination and planning are impacting immunization service delivery quality and outreach, affecting the project's ability to achieve immunization targets across the population, including refugees and host communities.
evidence_quote: Poor quality of immunization registered filling. Continued difficulties with coordination, planning and outreach.

risk_title: Low Functional Community Health Worker Implementation in Refugee and Host Community Areas
risk_summary: Communities with functioning community health workers per national norms remain at 0% achievement, with only a proposal to hire 500 community health workers pending ministerial consideration. This affects service delivery in underserved areas including refugee populations.
evidence_quote: Communities with functioning community health workers per the norms set by the National Community Health Strategy (Percentage)... 0.00 31-Dec-2024... The National Community Health Strategy is formulated and a proposal to hire 500 community health workers is made to the Minister of Health for consideration.

risk_title: Minimal Progress on Community Engagement Mechanisms for Refugee and Host Populations
risk_summary: Facility Community Committees remain largely non-functional (only 1 of 18 assessed as operational), and annual regional/national health fora with adopted resolutions have not been completed. This undermines citizen engagement and grievance mechanisms for vulnerable populations including refugees.
evidence_quote: Primary health facilities with functional Facility Community Committee assessed by the PBF quality checklist (Number)... only 1 was assessed as 'functional/operational' by the PBF quality check list... Completion of annual regional and national health fora with adopted resolutions (Yes/No) No... 0.00 31-Dec-2024

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Rated High at Project Approval
risk_summary: The project faces a High political and governance risk rating, indicating significant concerns about the political environment and governance capacity in Djibouti that could affect implementation of public finance management reforms.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High

risk_title: Critical Implementation of Governance Structures for PFM Reform
risk_summary: The project's effectiveness depends on implementation of a Decree and Order establishing governance structures for PFM reform. Fulfillment of these dated covenants is identified as the most critical challenge, suggesting potential governance fragility or institutional resistance to reform implementation.
evidence_quote: The main challenge remains the fulfillment of the dated covenants set out, the most critical of which is the implementation of the Decree and Order relating to the PFM Reform.

risk_title: Inactive Project Steering Committee Affecting Governance
risk_summary: The project steering committee for SKILLS has not yet become operational, creating a governance gap that may impede coordination between ministries and stakeholder engagement on project implementation.
evidence_quote: Le comité de pilotage du projet Skills n'est pas encore actif, la mission est en discussion avec les institutions concernées sur une alternative définitive pour la mise en place d'un comité de pilotage du projet.

risk_title: Incomplete Implementation of EFTP Governance Modernization Framework
risk_summary: While regulatory texts for EFTP governance modernization have been drafted and signed, their application remains incomplete and ineffective, potentially undermining institutional capacity and sectoral coordination necessary for project success.
evidence_quote: Bien que ses actions sont constitué et signé, l'application n'est pas encore pleinement effective.

risk_title: Delayed Stakeholder Mobilization and Consultation Planning
risk_summary: The stakeholder mobilization schedule shared in the previous mission was not implemented, risking reduced beneficiary engagement and social cohesion in project activities, particularly for vulnerable groups including refugees and women.
evidence_quote: Le planning partagé lors de la précédente mission n'a pas été mis en œuvre. La mission recommande son actualisation et exécution au prochain semestre pour garantir l'engagement des bénéficiaires.

risk_title: Non-Implementation of Gender-Based Violence Action Plan
risk_summary: Despite ESAHS training in June 2024, the agreed Gender-Based Violence (GBV) action plan has not been transmitted, indicating weak institutional capacity or commitment to safeguarding vulnerable populations, particularly women and girls in training programs.
evidence_quote: Malgré la formation ESAHS en juin 2024, le plan d'action VBG convenu n'a pas été transmis.

risk_title: Refugee Skills Assessment and Integration Planning Delays
risk_summary: While a consultant has begun profiling refugees in camps (Ali Addeh, Holhol, Markasi), the finalization of adapted training plans for refugee youth development is delayed, potentially affecting vulnerable displaced populations' access to employment opportunities.
evidence_quote: Un consultant a démarré une mission sur le terrain dans les camps d'Ali Addeh, Holhol et Markasi pour réaliser un rapport sur le profilage des réfugiés... Le MENFOP prévoit de finaliser un plan de formation dédié aux réfugiés en décembre 2024.

risk_title: Weak Internal Audit Independence Compromising Fiduciary Controls
risk_summary: The internal audit function is compromised by a conflict of interest: the internal auditor reports to the project coordinator whose processes they are mandated to review, violating international audit standards and weakening fiduciary oversight critical for project credibility.
evidence_quote: La fonction d'audit interne existe mais pour le moment est assurée par un consultant individuel qui est sous l'autorité hiérarchique de la même coordination dont il a l'obligation de revoir les processus internes – ce qui pose un problème manifeste d'indépendance et objectivité de la fonction.

risk_title: Delayed Environmental and Social Management Plan Implementation
risk_summary: Environmental and Social Management Plans (PGES) for technical school rehabilitation are prepared but not yet implemented, and feasibility studies for new centers have not yet integrated environmental and social aspects, risking non-compliance and community tensions.
evidence_quote: Les PGES pour la réhabilitation des lycées techniques sont prêts mais non mis en œuvre. La mission insiste sur leur application dès le démarrage des travaux. Pour les nouveaux centres, l'étude de faisabilité doit intégrer les aspects ES.

risk_title: Refugee and Migrant Population Access and Security Risks
risk_summary: The planned migrant and refugee survey requires access to refugee villages and displaced populations, which may present security challenges and coordination difficulties in a fragile context. HCR support is needed to facilitate field access to refugee populations.
evidence_quote: le HCR pourra apporter son soutien dans la relecture du questionnaire et pour faciliter l'accès aux populations réfugiées sur le terrain, par exemple dans les villages de réfugiés

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Strain from Multiple Concurrent Data Collection Activities
risk_summary: Multiple overlapping survey and census activities (EDAM5, migrant/refugee survey, RGPH analysis, REGED, employment survey) risk overwhelming INSTAD's institutional capacity, potentially compromising data quality and implementation timelines in a context where institutional fragility is evident.
evidence_quote: la multiplication de projets d'enquêtes en préparation sur la même période risque d'affecter les capacités de l'INSTAD à mener à bien des collectes cohérentes et assurer une haute qualité des données

risk_title: Survey Implementation Delays and Scheduling Conflicts
risk_summary: EDAM5 survey has already slipped from October 2024 to December 2024, with risk of further delays into holiday periods when populations are traveling and data quality is compromised. Multiple concurrent surveys threaten to compound scheduling pressures.
evidence_quote: L'enquête EDAM5, initialement prévue pour se dérouler en octobre 2024, a pris un peu de délai, et est maintenant planifiée pour décembre 2024. Il serait important d'être vigilant à ce que le retard ne continue pas de s'accumuler et que l'enquête soit décalée à des périodes comme les fêtes de fin d'année qui ne sont pas forcément les plus représentatives et une période pendant laquelle les Djiboutiens voyagent

risk_title: Procurement delays affecting emergency project implementation
risk_summary: Cumbersome and slow procurement procedures are significantly delaying project implementation, with strategic food stock procurement taking 10 weeks in the procurement cycle (3 weeks at CNMP, 7 weeks in signature circuit). This is impacting financial execution and project results.
evidence_quote: le dossier relatif au stock stratégique est resté 10 semaines dans le cycle de passation de marchés (dont 3 semaines au niveau de la Commission National de Marché Publics (CNMP) et 7 semaines dans le circuit des signatures)

risk_title: Governance coordination challenges between project and national procurement authority
risk_summary: The project requires urgent discussions with the National Public Procurement Commission (CNMP) to prioritize emergency project procurement files. The Minister committed to accelerating procurement processes, indicating governance friction between project implementation and national authorities.
evidence_quote: la mission a soulevé le défi sur la passation des marchés et la nécessité d'engager des discussions avec le CNMP afin que les dossiers de passation de marchés du projet PURCSA, qui est un projet d'urgence, soient traités en priorité

risk_title: Inefficient water distribution due to non-compliance with predefined routes
risk_summary: Six water tanker trucks deployed to regions are not following predefined routes, resulting in inefficient resource use. This requires urgent discussion with regional prefects to ensure proper utilization and effective water distribution.
evidence_quote: les itinéraires prédéfinis ne sont pas respectés, ce qui entraîne une utilisation inefficace des camions

risk_title: Delayed operationalization of complaint management mechanism for sexual exploitation and abuse
risk_summary: The Complaint Management Mechanism (MGP) for sexual exploitation and abuse/sexual harassment (EAS/HS) has not been operationalized. Only 53% of MGP implementation is complete as of September 2024, creating safeguarding gaps before project work activities commence.
evidence_quote: la mise en place du MGP a pris un retard considérable et n'a été fait que partiellement (à 53%)

risk_title: Inadequate capacity for gender-based violence prevention and response
risk_summary: The project lacks a dedicated gender-based violence specialist. The current social specialist is assuming this role, but HEIS consultant indicates additional capacity is needed. This creates implementation gaps for EAS/HS prevention and response in a food security crisis context.
evidence_quote: Bien que la spécialiste sociale actuelle assume ce rôle, le consultant HEIS indique que des capacités supplémentaires sont nécessaires sur ce sujet

risk_title: Delayed environmental and social safeguard documentation for hydraulic infrastructure rehabilitation
risk_summary: Environmental and social screening (ES) and impact assessment (ESIA) documents for hydraulic infrastructure rehabilitation sites were prepared in May/June 2024 but have not been transmitted to the World Bank. This delays project compliance and work commencement.
evidence_quote: bien que les documents aient été partagés avec l'UGP en mai/juin 2024, ce dernier n'a pas encore transmis ces documents à la Banque mondiale

risk_title: Coordination failures within project management unit affecting safeguard implementation
risk_summary: The Project Management Unit (UGP) coordination is delaying transmission of environmental and social documents prepared by the E&S team to the World Bank. Some instruments prepared in May-June have not been sent, causing unnecessary delays in safeguard compliance.
evidence_quote: la mission a aussi noté du retard au niveau de la Coordination de l'UGP, dans la transmission à la Banque des documents préparés par l'équipe E&S du projet

risk_title: Insufficient monitoring and reporting of environmental and social compliance
risk_summary: The second quarter environmental and social (E&S) report was not submitted to the World Bank. Regular and timely E&S reporting is necessary to ensure compliance with the Environmental and Social Framework (PESF) and project requirements.
evidence_quote: le rapport E&S pour le deuxième trimestre n'a pas été soumis à la Banque

risk_title: Delayed mid-term review due to insufficient project results
risk_summary: The project's mid-term review, initially planned for the current mission, has been postponed due to lack of project results and realizations. This indicates significant implementation delays affecting project trajectory and potential restructuring needs.
evidence_quote: la RMP du projet, bien qu'initialement prévu pour la mission en cours, a dû être reporté pour faute de résultats/réalisations du Projet

risk_title: Low project disbursement rate threatening project completion
risk_summary: Project disbursement rate is only 15.2% as of October 2024, one year before project closure (December 2025). This very low rate necessitates doubled efforts and close monitoring to ensure results before project end, with risk of project failure.
evidence_quote: Le niveau de décaissements du projet dans le système Client Connection de la Banque mondiale, à la date d'octobre 2024, est à 15.2%, qui est très bas à un an de la date de clôture du projet

risk_title: Refugee Population Integration in Food Distribution
risk_summary: Project design includes refugees as eligible beneficiaries in food crisis response, but no evidence of coordination mechanisms or tensions with host communities is documented. This represents a potential FCV risk if refugee populations create social tensions during food distribution.
evidence_quote: This indicator reflects the number of beneficiaries, including the poorest, most vulnerable and refugees that directly benefit from food distribution in case of crisis through the project.

risk_title: Drought-Driven Livelihood Stress and Potential Conflict
risk_summary: Project targets drought-affected pastoral and agricultural communities with limited livelihood restoration progress. Slow implementation of input distribution (seed, fertilizer, livestock) to 8,000 households could exacerbate tensions if communities perceive unequal or delayed support.
evidence_quote: The validation of the needs for the pastoral communities targeted by the Project is being finalized and the procurement process will be launched soon after.

risk_title: Water Infrastructure Rehabilitation Delays Affecting Pastoral Communities
risk_summary: Rehabilitation of hydraulic infrastructure scheduled to start January 2025 with only 747 of 3,000 target households currently supported. Delays in water access restoration for drought-affected pastoral communities could trigger resource-based tensions.
evidence_quote: With regards to the rehabilitation of the hydraulic infrastructures, the rehabilitation works are scheduled to start in January 2025.

risk_title: Delayed project implementation affecting impact measurement in conflict-affected context
risk_summary: Project procurement delays are reducing the available implementation window to measure impact of GBV prevention and response activities, with only 17 months remaining until project closure. This is particularly critical given the project's focus on fragile communities affected by gender-based violence.
evidence_quote: La mission a réitéré l'importance pour l'UGP de rattraper les délais enregistrés en matière de passation des marchés, afin que le projet puisse atteindre les objectifs de développement escomptés et bénéficier d'un temps raisonnable pour mesurer l'impact des activités... étant donné que la phase de mise en œuvre du projet entre dans ses 17 derniers mois.

risk_title: Slow contract negotiation with critical GBV response service providers
risk_summary: Negotiations with two NGOs for community mobilization against gender-based violence remain stalled at contract negotiation stage, delaying activation of core GBV prevention and response activities in vulnerable communities.
evidence_quote: La mission a noté que la sélection des deux ONGs pour la mobilisation communautaire contre les violences basées sur le genre sont toujours au stade de négociation de contrats. Elle recommande ainsi au MFF d'accélérer le processus car cela prend trop de temps pour des contrats aussi critiques.

risk_title: Delayed environmental and social safeguards monitoring in GBV prevention project
risk_summary: First environmental and social monitoring report covering April 2023 to April 2024 remains outstanding, delaying oversight of GBV prevention implementation and risk mitigation measures in target communities.
evidence_quote: Le projet a été mis en vigueur depuis le 15 avril 2023. Il a été convenu lors de la mission précédente que le premier rapport de suivi environnemental et social couvre la période allant d'avril 2023 à avril 2024. Ce dernier est toujours en attente.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in First World Bank Project Implementation
risk_summary: The Ministry of Women and Family (MFF) is implementing its first World Bank-financed project, facing significant capacity challenges in fiduciary management and project execution that are delaying implementation activities and affecting project performance ratings.
evidence_quote: La mission a réitéré l'intérêt de renforcement de capacités de l'UEP, s'agissant d'une première expérience pour le MFF d'être désignée en agence de mise en œuvre d'un projet financé et/ ou administré par la Banque mondiale. Malgré les efforts poursuivis par l'UEP depuis la validation du projet, cela ayant permis une mise en vigueur rapide du projet dans le délai imparti des 3 mois suivant l'approbation, et les étapes ci-dessous entreprises, des délais ont été enregistrés dans les activités relatives à la gestion financière et passation des marchés.

risk_title: Governance and Administrative Capacity Gaps in Financial Management Systems
risk_summary: Critical gaps in financial management infrastructure, including absence of accounting software despite project effectiveness since April 2023 and delayed financial reporting, indicate governance weaknesses that undermine fiduciary controls and project oversight.
evidence_quote: A la date de la mission, il est constaté que le projet n'est pas encore doté de logiciel comptable, et est donc dans l'incapacité de tenir convenablement la comptabilité des transactions du projet. La mission a pris acte de ce manquement et exhorté le projet à y remédier dans les meilleurs délais.

risk_title: Weak Internal Control Environment and Audit Functions
risk_summary: The project lacks an internal audit function and has inadequate control procedures documented in operational manuals, creating governance vulnerabilities in a context where the implementing ministry is new to World Bank project management.
evidence_quote: Bien que la fonction d'audit interne ne soit pas pourvue au sein du projet, le manuel n'en faisant donc aucune mention, la mission recommande que le projet puisse maintenir un environnement de contrôle interne adéquat et propice à l'implémentation des activités du projet.

risk_title: Delayed Implementation of Environmental and Social Safeguards Framework
risk_summary: Environmental and social safeguards implementation is behind schedule, with delayed submission of revised work plans and action plans for preventing sexual exploitation and abuse, affecting governance of community engagement and beneficiary protection.
evidence_quote: Le MFF a envoyé son plan de travail E&S et s'engage à élaborer un nouveau plan tenant compte des commentaires de la BM pour la fin mars 2024... Un plan d'action pour la prévention de l'EAS/HS sera préparé au plus tôt.

risk_title: Refugee Skills Assessment and Integration Challenges
risk_summary: Project activities targeting refugee populations require specialized assessment and training programs, with ongoing coordination challenges between government ministries and humanitarian organizations (HCR, IOM, ANBH) in refugee-hosting areas.
evidence_quote: Evaluations des compétences des réfugiés : le processus de recrutement d'un consultant est en cours pour piloter l'activité. Une mission sur le terrain est prévue à Ali Addeh, Holhol et Markasi. Actuellement, le consultant se trouve dans la phase de documentation et de rédaction de la note d'information en collaboration avec le HCR, l'IOM et l'ANBH.

risk_title: Coordination Gaps Between Government and Development Actors
risk_summary: Project implementation requires close coordination between multiple government ministries (MENFOP, MT, Finance) and international development partners (World Bank, USAID, humanitarian organizations), with potential for misalignment on priorities and timelines.
evidence_quote: Une réunion est prévue début juin 2024 pour présenter les initiatives du projet aux ministères de l'Éducation, du Travail et des Finances.

risk_title: Governance Committee Establishment Delays
risk_summary: Project steering committee formation has experienced delays due to complexities in establishing high-level coordination mechanisms, affecting project governance and strategic alignment.
evidence_quote: Redynamisation du Comité de pilotage du projet Skills : En raison des complexités liées à la formation d'un comité de haut niveau, le projet a connu un retard dans la mise en place d'un comité de pilotage du projet.

risk_title: Regulatory Authority Governance Delay Affecting Project Legal Covenants
risk_summary: The appointment of ARMD (regulatory authority) board members remains pending since 2022, preventing fulfillment of a legal project covenant. This governance gap is delaying implementation of critical regulatory functions needed for the project's core objective of introducing competition in ICT.
evidence_quote: The appointment of the members of the ARMD's regulatory board is still pending since 2022. The World Bank continues to recommend the Government to take all necessary actions to fulfill this legal covenant of the project as soon as possible

risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Rating Sustained
risk_summary: The project maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance risk across all review periods (approval, October 2023, and current April 2024), indicating persistent governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: High Stakeholder Risk Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: Stakeholder risk is rated 'High' across all review periods, suggesting tensions or resistance from key actors that may be impeding project progress and implementation of government connectivity pilots and digital skills initiatives.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Stakeholders - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04: High, Proposed Rating: High
